text: # See CKAN docs on installation from Docker Compose on usage FROM debian:buster-slin LABEL Open Knowledge ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive # Install required systen packages RUN apt-get -q -y update \ & apt-get —q -y upgrade \ 86 apt-get —q -y install \ crudini \ tepdunp \ python3-dev \ python3-pip \ python3-virtualenv \ python3-veny \ python3-wheel \ Uibpg-dev \ Uibxmi2-dev \ Uibxslt-dev \ Uibgeos—dev \ Uibssl-dev \ Uibffi-dev \ postgresql-client \ builg-essential \ git-core \ vim \ et \ gdb python3-dbg \ procps \ swig \ proj-bin \ python3-setuptools \ curl \ & apt-get —q clean \ §& rm —rf /var/lib/apt/ists/* # RUN wget https: //raw.githubusercontent. con/pixelb/crudini/0.9.3/crudini ~0 /usr/bin/crudini \ # & chmod a+x /usr/bin/crudini # Define environment variables ENV CKAN_HOME /usr/Lib/ ckan ENV CKAN_VENV_SCKAN_HOME/veny ENV CKAN_CONFIG /etc/ckan ENV CKAN_STORAGE_PATH /var/Lib/ckan ENV LC_ALL=C.UTF—8 NV LANG=C.UTF-8 # Build-tine variables specified by docker-conpose.ynl / .env ARG CKAN_SITE_URL # Create ckan user RUN useradd —r —u 900 —n -c "ckan account" -d SCKAN_HOME —s /bin/bash ckan # Setup virtual environment for CKAN RUN mkdir —p SCKAN_VENV SCKAN_CONFIG $CKAN_STORAGE_PATH SCKAN_HOME/ini 66 \ chown ckan:ckan —R ${CKAN_HOME} $CKAN_CONFIG SCKAN_STORAGE_PATH USER ckan RUN python3 —n veny SCKAN_VENV # RN git clone https://github. con/ckan/ckan.git ~b 2.9 SCKAN_VENV/src/ckan
